name: p5.js
when_to_use: 需要教学 sketch、生成艺术或逐帧交互画布时用它,而非手写 canvas 生命周期——原生实现常在坐标变换、输入状态、draw loop 和实例清理上失败；非做刚体碰撞或统计图,前者用物理引擎、后者用图表组件。
why_valuable: AI 默认能写局部 canvas 绘制,但做不到稳定复用的 setup/draw 生命周期、输入归一化与实例隔离,容易生成泄漏的 requestAnimationFrame 样板；p5 把这些高频失败面收进 AI 熟悉的统一 API。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a teaching sketch, generative art, or an interactive frame-by-frame canvas instead of hand-writing the canvas lifecycle. Native implementations often fail on coordinate transforms, input state, the draw loop, and instance cleanup. It is not for rigid-body collisions or statistical charts; use a physics engine for the former and a chart component for the latter.
en.why_valuable: AI can write isolated canvas drawing code by default, but cannot provide a reliably reusable setup/draw lifecycle, normalized input, and instance isolation, and often generates leaking requestAnimationFrame boilerplate. p5 brings these common failure points into one API familiar to AI.

data_in.note: Input uses a p5 instance-mode sketch callback, not global-mode variables. boot creates the canvas from spec first, then passes the same p instance to the callbacks, avoiding window pollution.

sketch.setup?: (p: p5) => void - runs once after the canvas is created, default no-op
sketch.draw?: (p: p5) => void - runs every frame, default no-op

spec.note: The canvas defaults to 400px high and the container's clientWidth, falling back to 640px. vh and percentage heights are prohibited. For responsive changes, consuming AI should call p.resizeCanvas(newWidth, 400).

data_in.note: 输入采用 p5 instance mode 的 sketch 回调,不是 global mode 变量；boot 先按 spec 建 canvas,再把同一个 p 实例交给回调,避免污染 window。

sketch.setup?: (p: p5) => void —— canvas 建好后执行一次,默认 no-op
sketch.draw?: (p: p5) => void —— 每帧执行,默认 no-op

spec.note: canvas 默认高 400px、宽取容器 clientWidth(取不到时 640px),禁止 vh/百分比高；响应式变化由消费 AI 调 p.resizeCanvas(newWidth, 400)。

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe):p5 v2 default ESM import + instance mode new p5(sketch, element),显式 createCanvas(width, 400)。

carriers.widget: conditional:必须使用 instance mode 并把 shadow 内 HTMLElement 作为 new p5 的第二参数；不用 global mode,无 CSS/head 注入

isolation.evidence: No document.head / createElement('style') / adoptedStyleSheets / insertRule in +esm (0 hits). Input listeners bind to `.elt` (canvas element, 261 refs), not window — shadow-safe. Only window-level listeners are lifecycle/error: load(x4), blur(x2), focus(x1), error(x2), unhandledrejection(x1) — global but benign; 9 removeEventListener calls clean up on instance.remove(). With node arg supplied (boot passes shadow `el`), the canvas mounts into the shadow container, not document.body. Conditional = requires instance mode + node arg, exactly as catalog states.
